steps.name: analytical-procedure-scope-fixture-inventory
steps.summary: AP1 fixed the audit analytical procedure PoC scope to synthetic F/S fixtures first, excluding DART/API credentials, audit opinion, KAM, materiality, sampling, and internal-control conclusions. AP2 should add audit_analytics schema/runner for period line items, ratio/trend metrics, and deterministic anomaly inputs.

steps.name: ratio-trend-schema
steps.summary: AP2 added kifrs/workflows/audit_analytics with synthetic F/S fixture, FinancialStatementLine and AnalyticalMetric schema, plus calculate_metrics for line-item changes and gross margin, operating margin, current ratio, and debt-to-equity ratio. Verified by tests/test_audit_analytics.py.

steps.name: anomaly-note-renderer
steps.summary: AP3 added AnomalyFinding, detect_anomalies(), and render_anomaly_note(). The synthetic fixture now produces threshold findings for large line changes, operating margin drop, and debt-to-equity rise, with review questions and explicit audit-boundary wording. Verified by tests/test_audit_analytics.py.

steps.name: f-acc-output-linkage
steps.summary: AP4 added LinkedStatementCandidate and link_statement_candidates(), connecting AnomalyFinding targets to F-ACC StatementLineCandidate rows without turning them into audit conclusions. Verified with audit analytics and statement draft tests.

steps.name: analytical-procedure-report
steps.summary: AP5 completed the analytical procedure report: synthetic F/S metrics, threshold anomaly memo, and F-ACC StatementLineCandidate linkage are implemented while audit opinion, KAM, materiality, sampling, and internal-control conclusions remain out of scope. Completion gate passed with audit analytics and statement draft tests.
